name: power_manage
description: Power management: check voltage, set CPU governor, manage power-saving modes

action.description: Action: 'status' for power info, 'governor' to set CPU governor, 'hdmi' to toggle HDMI, 'led' to toggle activity LED

value.description: Value: governor name (performance/ondemand/powersave), 'on'/'off' for hdmi/led. Use 'none' for status.
